summary: Produce a reusable knowledge handoff for the mission "Consolidate knowledge handoff, terminology index, resource arbitration rules, and README examples to form an OpenClaw collaboration layer" to support the next iteration.
carry_forward: Record the Knowledge Link Body deliverables, boundaries, and member responsibilities.
Archive evidence summaries, risk lists, and confidence conclusions to avoid repeat judgment.
Preserve key path index: README.en.md, exmachina-en/README.md, exmachina-en/runtime/README.md, PROMPT.en.md, exmachina-en/BOOTSTRAP.md.
Consolidate user-facing instructions, examples, and migration differences.
Consolidate security assumptions, threat surfaces, hardening advice, and items needing review.
Consolidate the terminology list, decision index, question index, and reuse entry points.
decisions: Primary link body selection: Knowledge Link Body (score 13).
Support chain: Rationality Link Body, Validation Link Body, Documentation Link Body, Security Link Body.
Workspace stack: JSON, Markdown, Shell, TOML.
Preserve evidence levels, rejected options, and arbitration rationale for key conclusions.
open_questions: Record unverified assumptions from this round separately to avoid being treated as confirmed next round.
Convert high-risk but unexecuted actions into explicit to-dos and verification questions.
Continue tracking unconfirmed vulnerability assumptions, permission boundaries, and sensitive configuration risks.
next_updates: Sync new structure conventions, process rules, or examples back into README and export notes.
Update long-term docs with new critical paths, commands, or configuration entry points from this round.
Re-verify example commands, section structure, and reader-facing terminology.
Sync terminology, decisions, and open questions into the long-term knowledge index.
